name: Case Study Example
history: Works in an educational setting with children who have learning disabilities. Describes being pampered by parents and having minimal consequences earlier in life. Ongoing conflicts with authority figures.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: I must be perfect in my work to be valued.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I can't meet expectations, I am a failure.
coping_strategies: Overworking and taking on too many responsibilities to prove worth.
situation: Encouraging students to socialize and participate in campus activities, with results falling short of expectations.
auto_thought: I am not doing enough; I am failing my students.
behavior: Overworking and feeling overwhelmed by responsibilities.
